verses.translation: From the forest of His matted hair flows the pure waters of the Ganges
On His neck hangs the great snake like a garland
The drum beats damad-damad-damad-damad, echoing through the worlds

verses.text: चकार चण्डताण्डवं तनोतु नः शिवः शिवम्
verses.translation: And He performs His cosmic dance; may that Shiva bless us with prosperity
From the forest of His matted hair flows the pure waters of the Ganges
On His neck hangs the great snake like a garland
The drum beats damad-damad-damad-damad, echoing through the worlds

verses.text: चकार चण्डताण्डवं तनोतु नः शिवः शिवम्
verses.translation: And He performs His cosmic dance; may that Shiva bless us with prosperity
